exercises.header: I need to put my room in order.
exercises.answer: Πρέπει να τακτοποιήσω το δωμάτιό μου.

exercises.header: I am planning a trip to Crete.
What are you planning for the weekend?
I'm making an appointment with the doctor for tomorrow.
exercises.answer: Κλείνω ραντεβού με τον γιατρό για αύριο.

exercises.header: I booked an appointment at the hairdresser.
I'm getting ready to go out.
How long do you need to get ready?
I shop at the supermarket every week.
exercises.answer: Ψωνίζω στο σούπερ μάρκετ κάθε εβδομάδα.

exercises.header: I do the laundry every week.
I ran the washing machine because I have no clean clothes.
exercises.answer: Έβαλα πλυντήριο γιατί δεν έχω καθαρά ρούχα.

exercises.header: I cancel an appointment when I can't go.
exercises.answer: Ακυρώνω ραντεβού όταν δεν μπορώ να πάω.

exercises.header: I clean the room every day.
